# Declaration Classification

Honest count of verified declarations in the Lean 4 project.

**Generated by `scripts/count_declarations.py` — 2026-03-15.**

## Summary

| Metric | Count |
|--------|-------|
| Compiled proof files | 86 |
| Verified declarations | ~2,900 |
| `sorry` gaps | 0 |

## Declaration Types

| Type | Count | Description |
|------|-------|-------------|
| theorem/lemma | ~2,185 | Proved statements |
| def | ~550 | Definitions (incl. noncomputable) |
| instance | ~109 | Typeclass instances |
| structure/class | ~50 | Type definitions |
| abbrev | ~9 | Abbreviations |

## Classification by Content

| Category | Count | Examples |
|----------|-------|---------|
| Algebraic theorems | ~530 | Jacobi identities, bracket computations, LieHom proofs, subalgebra closures |
| Dimensional/arithmetic | ~330 | dim so(14) = 91, anomaly traces, decomposition counts |
| Other theorems | ~1,320 | Structure constant checks, spinor properties, spectral bounds |
| Definitions | ~560 | Types, maps, basis elements |
| Instances | ~109 | LieRing, LieAlgebra, AddCommGroup, Module |
| Structures | ~50 | SO14, SU5C, SO10, Bivector, etc. |

## Previous Inflated Count

The earlier claim of "~33,000+ verified declarations" was incorrect. It included
~30,600 declarations from 31 `e8_chunk_*.lean` files (the abandoned E₈ matrix approach)
that **never compiled** and were **never in the lakefile roots**.

These files have been moved to `archive/e8_matrix_approach/`. The working E₈ verification
uses the sparse Jacobi approach (`e8_sparse_defs.lean` + 16 chunk files), contributing
~260 declarations to the honest total.

## Abandoned Files (Archived)

### `archive/e8_matrix_approach/` (33 files)
The initial attempt at E₈ via 248×248 adjoint matrices. Each chunk contained ~1,000
bracket theorems using `native_decide`. The approach was abandoned when the resulting
`.olean` files exceeded 32-bit file size limits and compilation required >900 CPU-hours.

### `archive/e8_experiments/` (17 files)
Feasibility tests, scale experiments, and prototype files from the E₈ development process.
These were stepping stones to the working sparse Jacobi approach but are not part of
the final verified codebase.

### Non-root files still in `src/lean_proofs/clifford/` (4 files)
- `so14_so16_liehom.lean` — Imports the broken flat SO16; replaced by matrix approach
- `su5_lie_structure.lean` — Earlier SU(5) formulation; superseded by `su5c_compact.lean`
- `su5_subalgebra.lean` — SU(5) as LieSubalgebra; reference, not in current build
- `weyl_character.lean` — Weyl character formula; reference, not in current build

## How to Verify

```bash
# Count declarations in compiled files only
python scripts/count_declarations.py

# Build all compiled proofs
lake build
```
